banners.legacyConfigTitleSingular: {total} 件のレガシー設定エイリアスを検出しました
banners.legacyConfigTitlePlural: {total} 件のレガシー設定エイリアスを検出しました
banners.legacyApiPathTitleSingular: {total} request to the removed API path detected
banners.legacyApiPathTitlePlural: {total} requests to the removed API path detected
banners.curlHealthcheckTitle: カスタム curl ヘルスチェックのオーバーライドを検出しました
banners.healthcheckCommandLabel: ヘルスチェックコマンド：{command}
banners.legacyConfigBody: Legacy trigger inputs are still active for v1.6 compatibility. Rename {triggerEnv} variables to {actionEnv} or {notificationEnv}, and replace {triggerLabel} labels with {actionLabel} or {notificationLabel} before v1.7.
banners.legacyApiBody: Clients on this instance recently called the removed unversioned {oldPrefix} path and are receiving {statusCode} errors. Migrate them to the {v1Prefix} prefix. WUD-era integrations like wud-card or Homepage's whatsupdocker widget can set {compatFlag} instead of migrating.
banners.curlHealthcheckBody: Your Drydock container uses a custom curl-based healthcheck override. curl remains available for backward compatibility in v1.5.x and v1.6.x; v1.6.0 is the final warning release, and curl will be removed from the image in v1.7.0. Prefer the built-in image healthcheck, or update your override to {bin}.
